🏆 High-Elo Ace Winner Playbook

VERIFIED Every cell extracted via deterministic TRANSLATION.txt template interpreter. No regex guessing, no hallucination — each line of every replay log mapped to the sim's own format definitions (99.996% match rate validated on 100 random games).
Sample: 18075 OP15-era ranked replays scanned (from 2026-W12 onwards). Kept 1573 games where Ace won AND the Ace player's Elo was ≥ 2400.
1573verified Ace wins
18,075games scanned
2400+Elo threshold
2026-W12+OP15 era

📐 Methodology

Source data: Combat logs uploaded by the OPBounty client after each ranked match. Stored as plain text with per-action lines. We have 65,182 Ace games on disk total; this playbook uses only OP15-era (week ≥ 2026-W12), mode-0 (Standard ranked), Ace-won games where the Ace player's Elo at game-start was ≥ 2400.

Interpretation: Each log line is mapped to its corresponding Log.* template from the simulator's own TRANSLATION.txt file (225 templates). Deterministic — no regex pattern guessing. Card codes extracted from the <link="CODE"> markup embedded by the sim. Validated on 100 random games at 99.996% line match (only chat messages and "Opponent Has Disconnected!" are skipped).

What each column means:

  • Life: Ace player's life at start of that turn. Most common values shown with counts.
  • Top deploys: Cards the Ace player deployed on that turn, sorted by frequency. % = winners who deployed that card. ♻️ = which cards they trashed for the -2000 leader effect that turn.
  • Ace swing: Power the Ace LEADER swung at (post any opp effects). Top 3 values shown with raw counts.
  • Char attacks: Which CHARACTERS attacked that turn (excluding leader).
  • Opp counter cards thrown: Cards the OPPONENT discarded as counter against the Ace player's attacks during that turn.
